text.title: Beta Cohort Communication Cadence Output Contract
text.summary: Pins the shape of a valid Beta Cohort Communication Cadence output. Subagent must satisfy this before returning to the caller.

forbidden.pattern: cadence skipped >2 consecutive weeks with no public reason

allowed-transformations.transformation: Trim narrative fields to ≤500 chars preserving named entities + numeric claims.
Promote a 'no decision yet' state to status='pending' rather than fabricating a decision.

list.item: cohort_size populated with a typed value
cadence_calendar populated with a typed value
broadcast_template populated with a typed value
graduation_criteria populated with a typed value
alumni_program populated with a typed value
feedback_completion_pct populated with a typed value
owner populated with a typed value
No forbidden pattern matches the output
